clue: Tool, maybe for sand castle, covered by towel
explanation: A TROWEL is a kind of tool, maybe for sand. Castle = rook (R), covered by TOWEL, gives TROWEL.
hints: Castle, in cryptics, can be represented by an R, for "rook".
"Covered by" implies putting one part of the wordplay into another.
The definition is "tool, maybe for sand". It's a little vague!
